pi_items.source: task.json specification and setup_task.sh directory creation
task.json description: 'Draw vertical grid lines every 600 mm' and 'horizontal grid lines every 600 mm'
AutoCAD Color Index standard: Color index 7 is White. Verified via https://gohtx.com/acadcolors.php
AutoCAD Color Index standard: Color index 8 is Dark Gray. Verified via https://gohtx.com/acadcolors.php
AutoCAD Color Index standard: Color index 2 is Yellow. Verified via https://gohtx.com/acadcolors.php

privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic CAD task requiring the user to create a reflected ceiling plan drawing in LibreCAD with specific geometric dimensions (6000 mm × 4800 mm room), a ceiling grid with 600 mm spacing, and 6 lighting fixtures arranged in 2 rows at coordinates (1000,1600), (3000,1600), (5000,1600), (1000,3200), (3000,3200), (5000,3200). The drawing must be saved as DXF format to /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/reflected_ceiling_plan.dxf using three named layers: ROOM (color index 7/white), CEILING-GRID (color index 8/dark gray), and LIGHTING (color index 2/yellow). All metadata specifications are consistent with the task description and verified against standard AutoCAD DXF color indices and LibreCAD's documented DXF export capabilities.
